Salary Inflation Calculator

Use LocalInflation to compare wage growth with inflation and understand whether salary gains kept up with rising prices. The main calculator also shows local purchasing power and wage charts where data is available.

Open wage vs inflation calculatorCompare purchasing powerFind a city calculator

FAQ

What is a salary inflation calculator?

It compares salary or wage growth with inflation to show whether purchasing power rose or fell.

How much salary growth keeps up with inflation?

A salary generally needs to rise by at least the inflation rate over the same period to keep purchasing power steady.

Can wages rise while buying power falls?

Yes. If prices rise faster than wages, purchasing power can fall even when nominal pay increases.

Where should I start?

Use the wage vs inflation calculator or choose a city inflation calculator to compare local price growth and wages.
